childNodes.textContent: .turbo-progress-bar { position: fixed; display: block; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 3px; background: rgb(0, 118, 255); z-index: 2147483647; transition: width 300ms ease-out, opacity 150ms ease-in 150ms; transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px); }

.sidebar-tooltip { display: none !important; }.sidebar-tooltip-popup { position: fixed; padding: 8px 12px; background-color: rgb(31, 41, 55); color: white; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4) 0px 4px 12px; white-space: nowrap; z-index: 99999; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s ease-in-out; }.sidebar-tooltip-popup.visible { opacity: 1; }.sidebar-tooltip-popup::before { content: ""; position: absolute; right: 100%; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); border-width: 5px; border-style: solid; border-color: transparent rgb(31, 41, 55) transparent transparent; }

node.textContent: SELECT "users".* FROM "users" WHERE "users"."id" = 1049243442 ORDER BY "users"."id" ASC LIMIT 1 /*action='show',application='ActiveRabbit',controller='replays'*/;
SELECT 1 AS one FROM "projects" WHERE "projects"."account_id" = 1056936461 LIMIT 1 /*action='show',application='ActiveRabbit',controller='replays'*/;

SELECT "pay_subscriptions".* FROM "pay_subscriptions" INNER JOIN "pay_customers" ON "pay_customers"."id" = "pay_subscriptions"."customer_id" WHERE "pay_subscriptions"."status" IN ('active', 'trialing') AND "pay_customers"."owner_type" = 'User' AND "pay_customers"."owner_id" IN (SELECT "users"."id" FROM "users" WHERE "users"."account_id" = 1056936461) ORDER BY "pay_subscriptions"."updated_at" DESC LIMIT 1 /*action='show',application='ActiveRabbit',controller='replays'*/;

SELECT "replays".* FROM "replays" WHERE "replays"."account_id" = 1056936461 AND "replays"."project_id" = 946017709 AND "replays"."id" = 301 LIMIT 1 /*action='show',application='ActiveRabbit',controller='replays'*/;

SELECT "api_tokens".* FROM "api_tokens" WHERE "api_tokens"."account_id" = 1056936461 AND "api_tokens"."project_id" = 946017709 AND "api_tokens"."active" = TRUE ORDER BY "api_tokens"."id" ASC LIMIT 1 /*action='show',application='ActiveRabbit',controller='replays'*/;
SELECT "api_tokens".* FROM "api_tokens" WHERE "api_tokens"."account_id" = 1056936461 AND "api_tokens"."project_id" = 946017709 AND "api_tokens"."active" = TRUE ORDER BY "api_tokens"."id" ASC LIMIT 1;
SELECT 1 AS one FROM "projects" WHERE "projects"."account_id" = 1056936461 LIMIT 1;
SELECT "projects".* FROM "projects" WHERE "projects"."account_id" = 1056936461 ORDER BY "projects"."name" ASC /*action='show',application='ActiveRabbit',controller='replays'*/;
